name: Stemtech Corp
summary: PART I Item 1: Description of Business Stemtech Corporation and its Subsidiaries (collectively, the Company, or Stemtech) was incorporated in the State of Nevada, USA on September 4, 2009 under the name Globe Net Wireless Corp. with ticker symbol GNTW. Our corporate name was changed to Stemtech Corporation in the state of Nevada.in August 2021. We were listed on the OTCQB market under symbol STEK in April 2021.
